title: [ORC] Implement simulation lifecycle pytest fixture
body:
## Objective
Provide a pytest fixture that starts a SimulationMaster before a test and tears it down cleanly after, regardless of outcome.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `simulation` fixture defined in `src/svf/plugin.py`
- Fixture accepts FMU path, dt, and stop_time via pytest marks or parameters
- SimulationMaster is fully initialised before the test body runs
- Teardown is guaranteed even if the test raises
- Integration test confirms fixture behaviour

## Implements
SVF-DEV-040, SVF-DEV-041

title: [ORC] Implement observable assertion API
body:
## Objective
Provide a fluent API for test procedures to assert time-bounded telemetry conditions via DDS subscriptions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `observe(variable).reaches(value).within(seconds)` API
- Subscribes to SVF/Telemetry/{variable} DDS topic
- Polls until condition met or timeout expires
- Raises AssertionError with descriptive message on timeout
- Integration test validates against running simulation

## Implements
SVF-DEV-043

title: [ORC] Implement ECSS verdict mapper
body:
## Objective
Map pytest outcomes to ECSS-compatible verdicts and include them in test reports.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verdict enum: PASS, FAIL, INCONCLUSIVE, ERROR
- pytest hook maps outcomes to verdicts after each test
- Verdict recorded in JUnit XML output
- Unit tests cover all verdict mappings

## Implements
SVF-DEV-044

title: [ORC] Implement stimuli injection API
body:
## Objective
Provide a clean API for test procedures to inject commands into the simulation via DDS command topics.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `inject(variable, value)` API publishes to SVF/Command/{variable}
- FmuModelAdapter subscribes to command topics and applies values before next step
- Integration test confirms injected command affects simulation output

## Implements
SVF-DEV-042
